title: "Embrace Spring with Nowruz: The Persian New Year Celebration!"
description: Nowruz, the Persian New Year, is a globally celebrated festival marking the first day of spring and the beginning of the year in the Iranian calendar. The 13-day celebration, symbolizing rebirth and renewal, involves spring cleaning, settling debts, decorating homes with flowers, gathering around a 'Haft-Seen' table, and spending the 13th day outdoors to avoid bad luck.
